description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/role_unit/role_unit_containers:build with a docker:dind service. Define a hidden job template .test_template that runs the shell command `RU_ENV_IMAGE=${CI_JOB_NAME/*_/} tests/bash_unit tests/tests_ru_tst`. Add a job named single_debian10 that extends .test_template, runs in the default test stage, and sets the variables DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and STORAGE_DRIVER=vfs. No additional stages, artifacts, caches, or rules are defined.
